creator: matthias.andree@gmx.de
text:
And just to complete the records, Martin has committed an additional change
to .../Makefile around line #24 on my behalf (without separate GNATS
records), in that -D_EXT2_USE_C_VERSIONS_ is added to CPPFLAGS in
CONFIGURE_ENV.
This was discussed through instant messenger, and I approve of this change.

-- 
Matthias Andree
